arts.ttl: Oliver Baumann: Who is the Hoffenheim goalkeeper and late-blooming Germany international?
arts.sum: Having been a dependable Bundseliga shotstopper for over a decade, Oliver Baumann capped his brilliant form for Hoffenheim by becoming Germany's first-choice goalkeeper at the age of 34. He made his Bundesliga debut in May 2010 in a 3-1 win against Borussia Dortmund, and became the first-choice goalkeeper at the Black Forest club from the following season.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid legend Toni Kroos gets a new job
arts.sum: Former Real Madrid star Toni Kroos has announced his new role as a shareholder in the German sports agency Sports360, of which he was a client during his playing days. “ I will offer advice to some players on their sports careers and share my experiences,” he said about his new role as a shareholder.

arts.ttl: Fagioli Relishing Juventus Exit and Fiorentina Switch
arts.sum: Nicolò Fagioli wasted little time garnering a starring role at Fiorentina and punished his former team Juventus with two assists in the most recent game. He provided a lucid analysis of his time with the Bianconeri and departure. The post Fagioli Relishing Juventus Exit and Fiorentina Switch appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Die Nationalelf vs the Azzurri: Germany's top 5 clashes with Italy
arts.sum: As Germany get ready to do battle with age-old rivals Italy in the UEFA Nations League quarter-finals on 20 and 23 March, bundesliga.com takes a look at the top 5 clashes between two nations who boast some of the proudest pedigrees in world football. As reigning world champions heading into this first major tournament since their resounding success in Brazil in 2014, Germany may have enjoyed favourite status in this quarter-final clash, but it was far from a walk in the park for Joachim Löw's side.
